kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Matilda goes with Southgate or someone in the North Side goes with Cedric.
More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the North Side than members of the Joiners' Guild.
More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the River Ward than members of the Joiners' Guild.
12 coins goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Tanner, and Oldwall.
At most one of (the members of the Hill Ward and Edmund) belongs to the Joiners' Guild.
If Tanner goes with 12 coins, then either Potter goes with Highrow or Southgate goes with Cedric (but not both).
Between Cooper and Oldwall, one goes with Aldric and the other with 9 coins.
Rowan goes with exactly two of Potter, Kingsford, and 14 coins.
Either Godfrey belongs to the Clothiers' Guild or both members of the River Ward belong to the Clothiers' Guild (but not both).
At most one of (the members of the Ironmongers' Guild and the artisan with 13 coins) belongs to the South Side.
Aldric goes with Oldwall if and only if either Bridgegate does not go with 12 coins or 14 coins goes with Rowan (but not both).
11 coins, 13 coins, and 14 coins go with Matilda, Weaver, and Southgate, in some order.
